Fig. 2: Overview of semantic zone-based keyframe management. The Semantic Zone Manager uses the estimated pose to determine the current zone and to form an active keyframe list. The Memory Manager enforces MemoryThr by maintaining an active zone list and an unload zone list, ensuring strict compliance with the memory limit before loading new keyframes from the map database.
Fig. 3: Memory usage comparison between (a) Basic + VLM and (b) Semantic + VLM.
